items.description: Vehicle fire on I-80 westbound between 5.3 miles east of Exit 133: PA 53 - PHILIPSBURG/KYLERTOWN and 4.3 miles east of Exit 133: PA 53 - PHILIPSBURG/KYLERTOWN. There is a lane restriction.
